description: CompositionPurple round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves and graphic print on the frontFittingComfortWash careHand wash separately in cool water at 30 degrees Do not scrub Do not bleach Turn inside out and dry flat in shade Warm iron on reverseDo not iron on printIf you are the travel freak and the one who loves to hoard souvenaires from the world over, this inkfruit t-shirt is a must-have in your wardrobe. The graphic print exudes a fun vibe, while the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with jeans and sports shoes or shorts and flip flops for unparalleled cool.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirts Height: 5'7", Chest: 33"
